mapper.select:
SELECT o.seller_id AS sellerId, i.sku_id AS sku, SUM(i.quantity) AS quantity FROM sales_order o JOIN sales_order_item i ON i.order_id = o.order_id
GROUP BY o.seller_id, i.sku_id

SELECT o.seller_id AS sellerId, COUNT(*) AS totalOrders FROM sales_order o
GROUP BY o.seller_id

SELECT DATE_FORMAT(o.ordered_at, '%Y-%m') AS month, o.seller_id AS sellerId, i.sku_id AS sku, SUM(i.quantity) AS quantity FROM sales_order o JOIN sales_order_item i ON i.order_id = o.order_id
GROUP BY DATE_FORMAT(o.ordered_at, '%Y-%m'), o.seller_id, i.sku_id ORDER BY month ASC
